meta.title: Gijilai | Personalized Parenting Guide
meta.description: Scientific temperament analysis for children. Take a 10-minute survey to understand your child's temperament and get personalized parenting guidance.

pricing.headline: Understand Your Child Deeply
pricing.subtitle: Unlock all features with a premium subscription

home.dailyMessage: Try a conversation that matches your child's temperament today.
home.testDescription: Understanding your child's temperament changes communication.
home.parentTestDescription: Knowing your temperament makes parenting much easier.
home.consultCTA: Want to solve parenting concerns with temperament?

home.trialEndingDesc: Keep consultations, practice history, and report-based guidance connected.
home.welcomeSubtitle: Ready to start with your child?
home.welcomeDescription:
Understand your child's innate temperament
and take the first step to personalized guidance.
home.onboardingTitle:
Welcome!
Let's get to know your child
home.onboardingDescription:
Understand your child's innate temperament
and help them grow beautifully
with your warm perspective.
home.customPrescriptionDesc: We interpret your child's signals correctly.
home.surveyIntroDescription:
Understanding your child's innate temperament
helps you love more wisely.

Discover your child's unique light
with a simple 3-minute test.

survey.title: Temperament Assessment
survey.introHeadline2: why do they act that way?
survey.introDescription:
Understanding temperament makes parenting easier.
Check your child's temperament and
your parenting style in just 3 minutes.
survey.tipText: Even if the situation isn't exactly the same, choose the option closest to their usual behavior or feeling.
survey.analyzingChildDesc: We're creating a personalized temperament report based on {name}'s responses.
survey.analyzingChildDescDefault: We're creating a personalized temperament report based on your child's responses.
survey.analyzingFamilyDesc: We're capturing the beautiful harmony between child and parent temperaments in the analysis report.
survey.exitTitle: Wait! Are you sure you want to leave?
survey.exitDescription:
Your progress is saved,
but you won't see results without completing it.
survey.toParentDesc:
Now let's discover your (parent) temperament.
We'll analyze how well you match with your child.
survey.toParentingDesc:
Lastly, let's check your usual parenting style.
You'll get specific parenting solutions.
survey.finishDesc:
Great job!
Shall we check your family's special temperament analysis report?
survey.childBridgeDesc:
Great job.
Now it's time to discover your own temperament.
survey.parentingBridgeDesc:
Think about everyday situations with your child.
Let's check your parenting style.
survey.questionCardChildPrompt: How does your child behave in this situation?
survey.questionCardParentPrompt: How do you behave in this situation?
survey.questionCardParentingPrompt: How do you handle this as a parent?

landing.heroDesc:
Analyze parent and child temperaments with a scientific assessment,
and get conversation tips and parenting guides for your family.
landing.parentQuestion: What type of parent am I?
landing.step01Desc: Measure child and parent temperaments with CBQ/ATQ-based surveys.
landing.step02Desc: Analyze results to identify child's temperament type and parent-child compatibility.
landing.step03Desc: Get parenting guides and "magic phrase" conversation scripts by temperament.
landing.step04Desc: Solve specific parenting concerns with AI consultation and daily practice.
landing.feature1Desc: Measure parent and child temperaments with CBQ (child) and ATQ (adult) assessments. Classified into 8 types across 4 temperament dimensions.
landing.feature2Desc: Instead of "No!", we suggest conversation methods that match your child's temperament. Use specific situation-based scripts starting tonight.
landing.feature3Desc: Consult AI about specific parenting concerns, receive custom practice tasks, and check off daily to create change.
landing.beforeExample: "Clean up your toys! How many times do I have to tell you!"
landing.afterExample: "The toy friends want to go home~ Shall we help them together?"
landing.ctaDesc:
Discover your child's temperament type with a 3-minute survey.
Child temperament report is free.
landing.footerDisclaimer: This service does not replace medical diagnosis.
